title: Classic Storage Wall Side Base Unit
summary: A single base cabinet with a shelf-pin adjustable shelf, a mitered-frame door, and an optional pull-out drawer built from the leftover scrap.
description:
This is one modular base cabinet, meant to be built as a repeatable unit for a wall of storage — a plywood box with an adjustable shelf on shelf pins, closed with a mitered-frame door faced in 3/8" plywood or MDF. The door frame is built as thin rails and stiles glued and stapled to a plywood back panel rather than traditional cope-and-stick joinery, which is what makes it approachable without a router table: dry-fit the door back into the opening first and confirm an even 1/8" gap all around before you commit any glue to the frame pieces.

The optional pull-out drawer is a nice built-in efficiency: it's sized specifically to use up the scrap piece left over from cutting the main box, so building it costs you almost nothing extra in material once you've already committed to the cabinet.
timeLabel: 6–9 hrs, including the door and optional drawer

tools.note: Handy for notching the pull-out drawer face.
Squaring the box before the back goes on is called out explicitly at every stage.

materials.name: 3/4" MDF or plywood, ripped into 23-1/2" strips, 8 ft sheet
1x6 board, for the optional pull-out drawer
3/8" MDF or plywood, for backs and doors, full sheet
Butterfly hinges or face-frame euro hinges
Undermount drawer slides, 21"
materials.note: Only needed if building the optional pull-out drawer.

materials.name: Edge banding
materials.note: Only needed if staining rather than painting.

cutList.note: Optional — sized to use the scrap left from cutting the main box.

steps.title: Build the box
steps.body: Fasten the bottom (B) to the sides (A) — the top of the bottom panel sits 2-1/2" up from the floor, leaving 1-3/4" of clearance underneath. Add the top (C) to the sides with 2" fasteners.
materials: 3/4" MDF or plywood, ripped into 23-1/2" strips, 8 ft sheet

steps.title: Attach the back
steps.body: Check the box for square, then fasten the 3/8" plywood back with 1-1/4" fasteners.
materials: 3/8" MDF or plywood, for backs and doors, full sheet

steps.title: Add the footer and trim
steps.body: Check for square, then add the bottom trim (E) with 2" fasteners. Check square again, then add the top trim (F), keeping outside edges flush, and finally the side trim (G) the same way.

steps.title: Add shelf pin holes and the shelf
steps.body: Mark where the shelf will sit and drill two holes 1" from each end with a 1/4" bit, 1/2" deep — set your drill bit so only 1/2" is exposed to keep every hole consistent. Insert the shelf pins and drop in the shelf (H); it can be repositioned any time. If using plywood with a visible edge, finish it with edge banding.
materials: 3/4" MDF or plywood, ripped into 23-1/2" strips, 8 ft sheet

steps.title: Build the door
steps.body: Dry-fit the door backs (I) into the cabinet opening and confirm about a 1/8" gap all around, trimming if needed, and check your chosen hinges will fit the door thickness. Use 5/8" staples or brad nails plus glue and clamps to attach the rails (J) to the tops and bottoms of the doors, then the stiles (K) the same way, keeping outside edges flush. Weight the assembled doors flat under a piece of plywood and something heavy while the glue dries.
materials: 3/8" MDF or plywood, for backs and doors, full sheet

steps.title: Add base moulding and hang the door
steps.body: If dressing up the base, add the base moulding with 1-1/4" fasteners. Hang the finished door with your chosen hinges and add pulls or knobs.
materials: Butterfly hinges or face-frame euro hinges

steps.title: Build the optional pull-out drawer
steps.body: Cut the drawer bottom (L) from the scrap left over from the main box. Fasten the sides (M) to the bottom, then notch the front face as needed and fasten the front and back (N) to the sides and bottom. Mount using the undermount drawer slides.
materials: 1x6 board, for the optional pull-out drawer

images.alt: Modular storage base cabinet with a door and adjustable shelf
